items.title: Policy paper: UK Emissions Trading Scheme (UK ETS): policy overview
items.summary: The role of the UK Emissions Trading Scheme in UK decarbonisation and how the UK ETS Authority is developing the scheme.

items.title: Guidance: Taking part in the UK Emissions Trading Scheme markets
items.summary: This guidance explains the operation of the UK ETS markets and how to take part in auctions and in trading on the secondary market.

items.title: Provision of Services Regulations 2009: proposed reforms
items.summary: We are seeking views on proposed reforms to the Provision of Services Regulations 2009, under the Retained EU Law programme.

items.title: Baroness Maggie Jones appointed new chair of Acas
items.summary: Baroness Maggie Jones of Whitchurch has been appointed as the new Chair of Acas, following a fair and open public appointment process.

items.title: Financial support for nuclear lifetime extensions
items.summary: We're seeking views on amending the Contract for Difference (CfD) legislation to enable existing nuclear generating assets to be eligible for CfDs to incentivise investment into lifetime extensions.

items.title: Look up considerations for trade licences under the Belarus sanctions
items.summary: As part of the statutory guidance, a look-up guide listing considerations for granting trade sanctions licences.

items.summary: Guidance on picketing for employers, workers or members of the public who may be affected by a picket or any associated activities.

items.summary: Practical guidance to trade unions and employers to promote the improvement of industrial relations and good practice in the conduct of trade union industrial action ballots.

items.title: 100 schools cutting bills with Great British Energy solar panels
items.summary: 100 schools across England now cutting energy bills with Great British Energy solar panels.

items.title: Research: Estimating UK intra-firm trade
items.summary: This report develops experimental estimates of UK intra-firm trade and proposes data improvements.

items.summary: Example to indicate a potential approach to an assessment of a subsidy or scheme of particular interest.

items.summary: How ‘significant influence or control’ should be interpreted for companies.

items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.summary: Strategy document setting out a new economic approach to backing the UK’s strengths, with ambitious plans for 8 high-growth sectors.

items.summary: We're seeking views on proposed amendments to the CfD contract that need to be made to implement CIB reforms, and also on hybrid metering, ahead of Allocation Round 8.

items.summary: Statistics and analysis on the construction sector for February 2026.

items.summary: The list of regulators contains UK bodies that can be considered to have statutory regulatory functions.
